evals.prompt: Generate a bar chart of links created per month for the past 12 months and save it as links_monthly.png in the project root.
evals.expected_output: A PNG file named links_monthly.png is produced in the project root. Each of the 12 most recent calendar months is represented by a bar. The y-axis shows link counts. Each bar is labelled with its count.

assertions.text: A PNG file is written to the output path (links_monthly.png in the project root)
The chart covers exactly 12 months on the x-axis
Each bar is annotated with a numeric count

evals.prompt: Show me a monthly breakdown of how many short links were created over the last year. Export the chart as a PNG.
evals.expected_output: A PNG file is generated (default or specified path). The chart clearly shows monthly totals for the trailing 12 months with labelled axes and annotated bars.

assertions.text: A PNG file is created at the reported output path
The agent reports the full output path to the user

evals.prompt: Can you plot link creation stats for the past year and save the image to /tmp/link_stats_chart.png?
evals.expected_output: The chart is saved to exactly /tmp/link_stats_chart.png. The script respects the --output flag.

assertions.text: The PNG is saved to /tmp/link_stats_chart.png as requested
The --output flag is passed with the custom path when running the script
